'''Dovecote''' was the name of the mansion that was inhabited by [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], her husband, and their daughters. It was located on the edge of [[Koved City]] on [[Siluria III]]. Following the death of her husband at the hands of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation force, Adrimetrum formed a resistance cell using friends and family. Dovecote was used as their primary base, and it was their fallback point following the successful assault on [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]] [[Quannith]]'s mansion. [[Corwin Shelvay/Legends|Corwin Shelvay]] convinced Adrimetrum to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the mansion in the aftermath of the attack.
